steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank is a noun phrase with a common noun “lions” followed by proper names “Ginger and Shaka” in apposition.

steps.title: Apply the rule for restrictive appositives
steps.content:
Restrictive appositives don't take commas, and Ginger and Shaka are restrictive (essential to identify which lions). The other choices add commas, violating this rule.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
